address.map_location: Sagi Ramakrishnam Raju Engineering College , Bhimavaram

pos_sentences.text: The college also has tech center which is used for innovation purpose.
pos_sentences.name: Anonymous

pos_sentences.text: The college library has e-library which is provided with very good internet facility
pos_sentences.name: Anonymous

pos_sentences.text: Campus placements are very good in campus
pos_sentences.name: Siva ganesh

pos_sentences.text: Conducting many hackathon regarding codings like spurthi
pos_sentences.name: Lahari Rongali

pos_sentences.text: The college laboratories are well maintained.
pos_sentences.name: Anonymous

pos_sentences.text: Ground , sports like basketball , badminton, kabaddi,volley ball are major sports in srkr.
pos_sentences.name: Veerendra Nadh

pos_sentences.text: There no ragging in our college and seniors are very friendly
pos_sentences.name: Nadipalli Madhu Praveen Sai Narasimha

pos_sentences.text: Events, Technical Fests, Hackathons are present.
pos_sentences.name: Burada Dinesh Kumar

pos_sentences.text: I like freedom in campus, to roaming. No one stops your enjoyment
pos_sentences.name: K LUCKY

pos_sentences.text: I like participating in different clubs in my college
pos_sentences.name: Botsa Pavani

neg_sentences.text: Staff is only focus on the syllabus completion no need to interact and guided the students
neg_sentences.name: Siva ganesh

neg_sentences.text: In our college there will be no dinning area for launch.
neg_sentences.name: Tirumalasetti Sai kiran

neg_sentences.text: Wifi signals are a bit slower in the college
neg_sentences.name: Ranganadham srinivas rao

neg_sentences.text: There is concern about limited resources
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous

neg_sentences.text: The food prices was bit high than normal
neg_sentences.name: Gedda Surya Teja

neg_sentences.text: We can't go out side of college before 4 pm. Even it is urgent
neg_sentences.name: Karri Revanth Ratan Reddy

neg_sentences.text: The waiting hall for the men are not much more
neg_sentences.name: Sai Pavan

neg_sentences.text: Hostel fees was very high in our college.
neg_sentences.name: Burada Dinesh Kumar

neg_sentences.text: Some classrooms maintenance is bad in some blocks of college
neg_sentences.name: Nadipalli Madhu Praveen Sai Narasimha

neg_sentences.text: The college doesn't contain cricket ground
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous
